name: ledgerline
description: Agent-native drafting, professional refinement, rendering, mixing, and editable revision-matched review in LedgerLine Studio.

interface.shortDescription: Draft, refine, render, and edit music in Studio
interface.longDescription: LedgerLine gives Codex a strict authored score language, creative briefs with protected material, evidence-backed musical refinement passes, and a revision-matched Studio for piano roll, performance lanes, score, waveform, spectrogram, mixer, engine provenance, build jobs, and reversible AI proposals. It supports MPE and note-expression planning, semantic instrument profiles, SoundFont/SFZ/VST3/CLAP render boundaries, deterministic reference rendering, bus mixing, licensed asset lineage, snapshots, and bundles.
defaultPrompt: Use $compose-music to ask my direction, write a compact draft, refine it in named passes, and open the current render in Studio.
Use $compose-music to inspect this LedgerLine project, preserve its protected material, and propose a professional refinement.
Use $compose-music to process my Studio delegation against the current revision and return a reversible edit proposal.
